sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63601" key="lisso/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λισσ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n63601.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">render insolvent</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[λις]σωθέντων</foreign> dub. in ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">524.43</biblScope> </bibl> (Crete, <date TEIform="date">iii B. C.</date>); cf. foreg. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
